Record Class TypeService.TypedMember

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.github._1c_syntax.bsl.languageserver.types.TypeService.TypedMember
Record Components:
owner - тип-владелец члена; null для глобальных функций/свойств
descriptor - описание члена
range - диапазон идентификатора-члена под курсором
callArgCount - число фактических аргументов вызова; -1 для не-вызова
argTypes - типы фактических аргументов (по порядку). Используется для type-aware подбора перегрузки сигнатуры (SignatureSelection.pickIndexByTypes(List, List)). Пустой список для не-вызова или если типы не удалось проинферить.
Enclosing class:
TypeService
public static record TypeService.TypedMember(@Nullable TypeRef owner, MemberDescriptor descriptor, Range range, int callArgCount, List<TypeSet> argTypes) extends Record
Найденный член типа в позиции курсора.

  • Constructor Details

    • TypedMember

      public TypedMember(@Nullable TypeRef owner, MemberDescriptor descriptor, Range range, int callArgCount)

    • TypedMember

      public TypedMember(@Nullable TypeRef owner, MemberDescriptor descriptor, Range range)

    • TypedMember

      public TypedMember(@Nullable TypeRef owner, MemberDescriptor descriptor, Range range, int callArgCount, List<TypeSet> argTypes)
      Creates an instance of a TypedMember record class.
      Parameters:
      owner - the value for the owner record component
      descriptor - the value for the descriptor record component
      range - the value for the range record component
      callArgCount - the value for the callArgCount record component
      argTypes - the value for the argTypes record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • owner

      public @Nullable TypeRef owner()
      Returns the value of the owner record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the owner record component

      Returns the value of the descriptor record component.

      Returns the value of the callArgCount record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the callArgCount record component

    • argTypes

      public List<TypeSet> argTypes()
      Returns the value of the argTypes record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the argTypes record component
